title: Job Opening Teacher at Navneet Education

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Teacher at Navneet Education
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Navneet Education. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Teacher to strengthen our Vijayawada-based team.

About Navneet Education:
Navneet Education is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Support students with special educational needs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Data Analysis

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Navneet Education!
